# Weird Unicode

- [ ] Café résumé naïveté façade Москва 東京 🌍 #unicode
- [ ] Description with [brackets] and (parens) and `code` and **bold** #weird
- [ ] Trailing whitespace task   
- [ ] Tab	separated	description #weird
- [ ] Wikilink [[some/note]] in description #wiki
- [x] Long line with many fields ✅ 2026-05-09 — and a long trailing description that goes on and on past where most readers would expect a task line to end, just to make sure we handle this without truncation
- [ ] Emoji-in-description 🚀 🎉 not a field #fun
